name: Northeastern Title Loans
description_short: Northeastern Title Loans provides auto title loans up to $10,000 with same-day funding across Delaware, Virginia, New Mexico, Nevada, and Michigan.
description_long:
Northeastern Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a vehicle equity-based lending company. The company positions itself as helping "hardworking Americans" access cash by leveraging the equity in their vehicles through auto title loans. They operate multiple locations across five states with licensing compliance in each jurisdiction, including Delaware, Virginia, New Mexico, Nevada, and Michigan.

The company offers auto title loans and car title loans with maximum loan amounts up to $10,000, subject to vehicle evaluation and repayment ability. Their primary service model involves loaning money based on a customer's vehicle title as collateral. They provide online payment options, account registration, and a customer login system for account management. Marketing materials emphasize fast access to cash and simplified application processes. The company operates with state-specific licensing and regulatory compliance, with each state office subject to that state's financial regulations.

Northeastern Title Loans distinguishes itself through its 25+ year operational history, multi-state presence, and established regulatory framework across multiple jurisdictions. They provide transparent fee schedules and itemization of charges for customers in Delaware and other states. The company maintains customer support through both phone (877-511-CASH) and online channels, with mechanisms for complaints and regulatory reporting.

However, title loans are inherently high-cost emergency debt products with significant limitations. The Claymont, Delaware location listed on this website page is permanently closed and customers are directed to Dover. Customers should understand that title loans risk vehicle repossession if payments are missed, making them appropriate only for short-term financial emergencies with genuine repayment capacity. The company provides appropriate warnings about this, particularly for Nevada customers, and recommends credit counseling for those with existing credit difficulties.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Established company founded in 1990 with 25+ years of operating history
Quick funding available with same-day or next-day cash access for qualified applicants
Loan amounts up to $10,000 available, higher than typical payday loans
Licensed and regulated in all operating states (Delaware, Virginia, New Mexico, Nevada, Michigan)
Online account management, payment, and application options available
Transparent fee disclosure with itemized charge schedules provided by state
Multi-state presence with 4+ active locations for customer convenience
cons: Uses vehicle title as collateral, creating repossession risk if payments are missed
High-cost debt product appropriate only for short-term emergency use, not long-term solutions
Claymont, Delaware location (advertised URL) is permanently closed; customers redirected to Dover
Title loans carry significant APR costs and renewal fees that compound debt for struggling borrowers
best_for: Individuals with immediate emergency cash needs ($1,000-$10,000) who own a vehicle outright
Borrowers who need funds faster than traditional personal loans but have vehicle equity available
People in states where the company operates (DE, VA, NM, NV, MI) with ability to repay within months
diagnosis: Northeastern Title Loans is appropriate exclusively for borrowers facing immediate, short-term cash emergencies who own a vehicle outright and have genuine ability to repay within weeks or months. The primary caveat is that vehicle title loans carry high costs and significant repossession risk if payments lapse—they should never be used as ongoing debt solutions or by consumers with existing financial instability.
services: Account registration and customer login portal
In-person loan origination at physical locations
Fee schedules and itemized charge documentation
Credit counseling referrals for customers with credit difficulties
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
